name: qtap-plugin-curl
title: curl Tool
description: HTTP request tool for LLMs to fetch web content and API responses

toolConfig.description: Make HTTP requests to fetch web content, APIs, or other network resources. Returns response headers and body.

configSchema.label: Allowed URL Patterns
configSchema.description: URL patterns to allow (one per line). Supports wildcards like *.example.com or exact domains like api.github.com. Leave empty to block all requests.

configSchema.label: Max Response Size (bytes)
configSchema.description: Maximum response body size in bytes before truncation

configSchema.label: Default Timeout (seconds)
configSchema.description: Default timeout for requests in seconds

configSchema.label: Follow Redirects
configSchema.description: Whether to follow HTTP redirects by default
